title: Uruguayan Lamb Papillote with Butter
description: A simple and flavorful papillote dish from Uruguay, featuring tender lamb and a hint of butter.
instructions: Season the lamb shoulder with salt and pepper.
Place a lamb shoulder in the center of each papillote.
Dot the top of each lamb shoulder with softened butter.
Fold the papillote over the lamb, sealing the edges.
Place the papillotes on a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes.
Rotate the papillotes and continue baking for an additional 15-20 minutes.
Check for doneness by inserting a meat thermometer into the lamb. It should read 145°F (63°C) for medium-rare.
Let the lamb rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve with the papillote folded back, allowing the steam to escape.
